title: FAMILY RELIEF NURSERY - 211info
text: FAMILY RELIEF NURSERY EAST PORTLAND FAMILY RELIEF NURSERY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides parenting education, support through home visits, and group activities and intensive case management. Children participate in therapeutic classrooms with low adult-child ratios, and families receive home visits that promote healthy parenting and child development. 2609 SE 136th Avenue Portland, OR 97236 Eligibility: High risk families with children ages 6 weeks to 5 years old. Intakes are completed to determine eligibility. Hours: Therapeutic Early Childhood Program: Monday-Thursday 9:30am-12:30pm Parent Education Classes: Offered quarterly one afternoon a week Respite Care: Monday and Wednesday afternoon for home based and waitlisted families Email (503) 972-9643 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 972-9643 Main phone Main phone (503) 972-9643 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for intake appointment. Intake appointments last between 45 minutes to an hour. Families are enrolled as space allows. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 9:30am-12:30pm Services: Case/Care Management * At Risk Families Child Abuse Prevention Child Guidance * At Risk Families Children's Out of Home Respite Care * At Risk Families Family Support Centers/Outreach * At Risk Families Home Based Parenting Education * At Risk Families Prenatal/Postnatal Home Visitation Programs * At Risk Families If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FAMILY RELIEF NURSERY EAST PORTLAND
